zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan於1484年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾德納姆昌時，她的父親John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan35歲，母親Marietta MacDonald32歲。她於大約1498年與Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1518年12月20日在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安可斯東普享年34歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan于1484年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾阿爾德納姆昌时，她的父亲John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan35岁，母亲Marietta MacDonald32岁。她于大约1498年与Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1518年12月20日在苏格兰米德洛迪安可斯東普享年34岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: MacIain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Basque: Castilianized form of Matxain, a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with a diminutive of the personal name Martin .

variants.name: Martin
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, Flemish, German, Czech, Slovak, Croatian, Italian (Veneto); Spanish (Martín): from a personal name derived from Latin Martinus, itself a derivative of Mars, genitive Martis, the Roman god of fertility and war, whose name may derive ultimately from a root mar ‘gleam’. This was borne by a famous 4th-century Christian saint, Martin of Tours, and consequently became extremely popular throughout Europe in the Middle Ages. In North America, the surname Martin has absorbed cognates and derivatives from other languages, e.g. Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Marcin , Albanian Martini , Polish surnames beginning with Marcin-, and Slovenian patronymics like Martinčič (see Martincic ). Martin is the most frequent surname in France and one of the most frequent surnames in Wallonia.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mártain, ‘descendant of Martin’ (compare 1 above). Otherwise, a shortened form of Gilmartin or McMartin ; sometimes also spelled Martyn.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan was born in 1484, in Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Scotland, her father, John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan, was 35 and her mother, Marietta MacDonald, was 32. She married Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay about 1498, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 20 December 1518, in Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 34, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan est née en 1484, à Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Écosse, son père, John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Marietta MacDonald, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay environ 1498, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 décembre 1518, à Corstorphine, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan 1484 in Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan 35 und ihre Mutter Marietta MacDonald 32. Sie hat um 1498 in Argyll, Scotland Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Dezember 1518 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan è nata il nel 1484 nel Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Marietta MacDonald, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay circa 1498, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 dicembre 1518, nel Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchanが1484年にスコットランドアルグイルアルドナムルチャンで生まれた時，父John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchanは35歳，母Marietta MacDonaldは32歳であった。約1498年にスコットランドアルグイルでAlexander Carragh MacDonald of Islayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1518年12月20日にスコットランドミドロスアンコルストルフィンで34歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan(이)가 1484년 스컷랜드 아그이 아드남르챈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marietta MacDonald(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1498년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1518년 12월 20일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 코르스토르필인에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Dunnyveg, Inverness, Scotland: Inverness, A' Ghàidhealtachd Hieland, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan nasceu em 1484, em Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Marietta MacDonald, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay aproximadamente 1498, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de dezembro de 1518, em Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan родилась в 1484 г. в местности арднамурчань, аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Marietta MacDonald, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay около 1498 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 декабря 1518 г. в местности корсторфаин, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine MacIain of Ardnamurchan nació en 1484, en Ardnamurchan, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Marietta MacDonald, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Alexander Carragh MacDonald of Islay aproximadamente 1498, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de diciembre de 1518, en Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
